head_commit.message:
Fix panic in find_reaper_process when parent exits concurrently

The parent process may have already exited and been deallocated when a
child calls find_reaper_process, causing upgrade() on the Weak reference
to return None. Replace unwrap() with ? so the caller falls back to the
init process as the reaper.

run.display_title: Fix panic in find_reaper_process when parent exits concurrently

head_commit.message:
Fix panic in find_reaper_process when parent exits concurrently

The parent process may have already exited and been deallocated when a
child calls find_reaper_process, causing upgrade() on the Weak reference
to return None. Replace unwrap() with ? so the caller falls back to the
init process as the reaper.

run.display_title: Fix panic in find_reaper_process when parent exits concurrently

steps.name: Check API docs of crates to publish
Check API docs of all crates

head_commit.message:
Replace AVL tree with arena-based red-black tree in EEVDF scheduler

Replace the recursive, Box-based AVL tree in the eligibility queue with
an iterative red-black tree backed by a Vec arena with a free list. This
avoids per-node heap allocations on the scheduler hot path and eliminates
deep recursion in tree operations.
